name: ssot-rtl
description: SSOTâ†’RTL: Parse YAML SSOT â†’ Generate multi-file RTL â†’ Compile â†’ Lint

tasks.content: [SSOTâ†’RTL] Parse all YAML SSOT files and plan RTL file generation
tasks.detail:
STEP 1 â€” Find SSOT YAML. Read <ip>/yaml/<ip>_config.yaml (or scan yaml/ for any .yaml). Confirm: top_module, parameters, io_list, registers, fsm, sub_modules present.
STEP 2 â€” Map sub_modules to output files. For each sub_module: note name, file, ssot_gen (true/false).
STEP 3 â€” Plan generation order: pkg â†’ regs â†’ decoder â†’ fsm â†’ axi_rd/wr â†’ mfifo â†’ core â†’ wrapper.
STEP 4 â€” Create rtl/ and list/ directories if missing.
Gate: All YAML sections read, file generation plan ready.

tasks.content: [SSOTâ†’RTL] Generate localparam constants block (NO package â€” V2K convention)
tasks.detail:
From SSOT parameters[] list: write a single localparam block at the top of the consuming module(s). For each parameter: localparam <NAME> = <default>; with a comment from parameter.description. PROJECT CONVENTION: do NOT generate a separate <ip>_pkg.sv with `package â€¦ endpackage` â€” packages are forbidden in BOTH dialects. If a constant is shared across multiple modules, replicate the localparam in each (or pass via module parameter override).
Gate: every parameter from YAML is present as a localparam in the modules that use it.

From SSOT registers section: generate APB register block in the active dialect (RTL_DIALECT). For each entry in register_list: (1) If repeat > 1 + stride, use generate for loop. (2) Write the sequential register block (`always @(posedge clk â€¦)` in V2K, `always_ff` in SV) for RW/WO registers with APB decode. (3) Write the combinational read mux (`always @(*)` in V2K, `always_comb` in SV). (4) Map fields[].bits to bit ranges. (5) Use registers.config for channel_stride and channel_base.
Gate: All register offsets match YAML exactly.

If SSOT has instructions section: generate casez-based instruction decoder. Map each instruction opcode â†’ casez branch. Set instr_type_o, is_multibyte_o, byte_length_o, is_valid_o.
If no instructions section: write placeholder decoder or skip.
Gate: All opcodes from YAML present in casez.

From SSOT fsm section: (1) Encode states as `localparam [N-1:0] IDLE = N'd0, RUN = N'd1, â€¦;` plus `reg [N-1:0] state, next_state;` (V2K). In SystemVerilog mode, `enum logic [N-1:0] { IDLE, RUN, â€¦ }` is allowed. (2) Write the sequential state register (`always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)` V2K / `always_ff` SV) with reset to IDLE. (3) Write the combinational next_state logic (`always @(*)` V2K / `always_comb` SV) from fsm.transitions[] â€” every transition.condition becomes an if/else branch. (4) Write the combinational output assignments. (5) Add a `default:` clause inside the case for safety.
Gate: Every FSM state and transition from YAML is present.

From SSOT io_list.interfaces: find axi_rd_master and axi_wr_master. Extract port widths. Generate AXI read master FSM (IDLEâ†’ADDRâ†’DATA) and AXI write master FSM (IDLEâ†’ADDRâ†’DATAâ†’RESP). Use parameters for DATA_W, ADDR_W, ID_W from SSOT parameters section.
Gate: Port widths match SSOT exactly.

From SSOT memory.instances: extract depth, width, ports. Write parameterized MFIFO with write pointer, read pointer, count. Add flush control. Use generate if multiple instances.
Gate: Depth and width match SSOT.

tasks.content: [SSOTâ†’RTL] Write <ip>_core.<ext> â€” LLM direct implementation (ssot_gen: false)
tasks.detail:
This is the LLM-written complex module. From SSOT features[] and dataflow: (1) Write 7-state FSM (IDLEâ†’WFPâ†’SEND_RDâ†’WAIT_RD_DONEâ†’SEND_WRâ†’WAIT_WR_RESPâ†’DONE_STATE). (2) Implement APB register writes for SAR, DAR, LOOP_CFG, CONTROL. (3) Implement AXI read/write handshake timing. (4) Add loop counter with auto-increment. (5) Add fault detection (rresp/bresp != OK). (6) Add $display for simulation visibility.
Gate: Core FSM matches all features in SSOT features[].

From SSOT sub_modules list: generate integration wrapper. Declare all ports from io_list.interfaces[].ports[]. Instantiate every sub_module (name â†’ file). Wire all interfaces together.
Gate: All sub_modules instantiated, port list matches io_list exactly.

Write <ip>/list/<ip>_core.f from filelist.rtl section (or generate from sub_modules list). Run iverilog to verify compilation: iverilog -o /tmp/<ip>_test -c <ip>/list/<ip>_core.f. Fix any errors. Run verilator --lint-only. Fix any warnings or add documented waivers.
Gate: 0 compile errors, 0 lint warnings.

Output:
```
[SSOT RESULT] rtl-gen DONE
Module   : <ip_name>
RTL files: <count> files generated
Filelist : <ip>/list/<ip>_core.f
Compile  : 0 errors
Lint     : 0 warnings
Handoff  : â†’ tb-gen or back to ssot-gen
```
